name: Crab Filled Cream Cheese Pastry
recipeInstructions:
Note: Lobster and shrimp may be substituted for the crab. Mix first four ingredients in a bowl. Add the crab meat. Fill pastry shells, chill, and serve.
Pastry Shells:
Cream the butter and cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add the flour and form into small balls. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate several hours. When ready to use, let soften and roll out to 1/4 inch thickness. Press into pastry cups and bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes. Fill and serve.
